allow: PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match "error|Error|cannot|Cannot"\) { "Contains errors" } else { "Clean page load" }; $html.Length)

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; $html | Select-String -Pattern "\(?i\)\(error|cannot|module not found\)" -AllMatches | Select-Object -First 10 | ForEach-Object { $_.Line.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0, $_.Matches[0].Index - 50\), [Math]::Min\(200, $_.Line.Length - [Math]::Max\(0, $_.Matches[0].Index - 50\)\)\) })

PowerShell($html = \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000" -UseBasicParsing\).Content; if \($html -match "Module not found|Axes can only"\) { "FONT ERROR STILL PRESENT" } else { "Font error resolved!" }; if \($html -match "Shape your life"\) { "Hero text found!" } else { "Hero text NOT found" })
